rulings.Case Title: MARTIN RYAN VS. 1001 CALIFORNIA STREET CONDOMINIUM HOMEOWNERS ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Plaintiffs Claire And Martin Ryans Notice Of Motion For Reconsideration Of Their Motion For Ccp Section 473(B) Relief
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for January 27, 2021 line 2. PLAINTIFF MARTIN RYAN, CLAIRE RYAN Plaintiffs Claire And Martin Ryans Notice Of Motion For Reconsideration Of Their Motion For Ccp Section 473(B) Relief The Honorable Ronald E. Quidachay is not available to hear this Motion. Motion for Reconsideration of Order denying CCP 473(b) motion is granted. Demurrer to the Fourth Amended Complaint is re-set for hearing for February 3, 2021. Plaintiff shall file and serve its oppositions to the demurrers no later than January 27, 2021 by 5:00 p.m. Oppositions shall address solely the issues raised in the demurrers as if filed at the time when opposition was originally due. Oppositions shall be accompanied by meet and confer declarations addressing good faith participation in meet and confer efforts mandated by CCP 430.41. By no later than February 1, 2021 defendants may file their respective replies to Plaintiff's oppositions. Plaintiff's counsel shall remit to defendants their attorney's fees incurred in connection with the demurrers and all filing related to CCP 473(b), Motions for Reconsideration, ex-parte appearance(s), etc. no later than February 2, 2021. No later than 8:30 a.m. on January 27, 2021 defendants shall submit declarations detailing attorney's fees described above. =(501/CFH)
